## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened (or linked) an issue to discuss the change first (for anything
      beyond a small fix)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes in `tests/`
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] I did not add dependencies unless necessary
- [ ] This change is compatible with the ZCode engine (this is a port of
      codex-plugin-cc; keep the engine layer ZCode-specific)
